title: Gear Second Awakens — Part 5
description: Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, this part follows Luffy, Blueno, Nico Robin, Franky, Nami. Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
summary: Luffy unveils Gear Second against Blueno, changing the scale of the fight and showing CP9 that the Straw Hats have evolved.
